title: helichrysum subluteum
intro: Helichrysum subluteum, also known as Yellow Everlasting, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. It is native to Australia and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as arthritis, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote tissue repair. Helichrysum subluteum can be prepared as an essential oil, tincture, or salve for topical use, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health benefits.
